title: (純分享) 想研究公司估值方法必去的資料庫 Damodaran online

replies.msg:
可能有不少人都知, 但都post 一 post 比多d 人知. 小弟今日所知有下面個spreadsheet
想即時有一個model 入數去估值: 係呢度:
http://www.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar/pc/fcffsimpleginzuCorona.xlsx

仲有, 呢個網最正除左係Business valuation 的Input 外, 係呢度
http://pages.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar/New_Home_Page/spreadsh.htm
一堆valuation spreadsheet templates

仲有, Business Valuation 有好多 input. 主要係:Risk-free rate, beta, equity risk premium 呢度都有好多資料.

係一個學Business valuation 的good starting point.

當然, 佢作為一個New York University Professor, 都寫左好多書關於valuation, 可以google 下再買黎睇.

Aswath Damodaran 的自介:
My name is Aswath Damodaran, and I teach corporate finance and valuation at the Stern School of Business at New York University. I am a teacher first, who also happens to love untangling the puzzles of corporate finance and valuation, and writing about my experiences.
.

replies.msg:
其實佢popularize 左 business valuation
比寫紙大contribution 好多，我覺得

大學最後一個sem就讀佢本Investment Valuation 最後個科攞埋distinction
btw佢舊年好似又有新書

replies.msg:
Great.

佢個approach 簡單易明，

當然 McKinsey 本valuation 都好正，2020年出左新
請問佢入面要輸入d資料係咪公司財報搵到?

quote.msg: 請問佢入面要輸入d資料係咪公司財報搵到?

replies.msg: 係，但risk free rate beta equity risk premium 要在佢個網站其他地方揾
